positive: A whimsical and elegant illustration of a stylized crescent moon cradling a cluster of bioluminescent stars and cosmic flora. The central composition features a highly detailed, stylized crescent moon with a matte, textured glow, emanating soft, iridescent light. Surrounding the moon are floating nebulas and crystalline star formations, drawn with thick, clean outlines and vibrant, contrasting jewel tones (deep sapphire, amethyst, emerald, and gold leaf accents). The style should be a modern, sophisticated Art Nouveau meets celestial tattoo design, emphasizing smooth curves, graphic depth, and high contrast silhouette edges. Perfect for a centered, repeating pattern repeat application on clothing. Dramatic, dark background with pops of light.
negative: blurry, messy, text, logo, watermark, signature, lowres, ugly, noise, bad anatomy, cartoonish, dirty, clutter, messy background
